title: poa australis
intro: Poa australis, also known as the green panic grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa australis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
